input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.2.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: any equivalency calculations must prove equivalency relative to steel tubing in the same

            rule F.2.3.2: Any Equivalency calculations must prove Equivalency relative to Steel Tubing in the same
F.2.3.2 Any Equivalency calculations must prove Equivalency relative to Steel Tubing in the same 
application

final_answer: Any Equivalency calculations must prove Equivalency relative to Steel Tubing in the same application
